templates.text: The rival studies you with the same hunger you study your cards. They have been waiting for an opponent.
You are not the only one who came here to learn. The dungeon offers competition as its own kind of lesson.
Two sets of footprints in the dust. One arriving. One already here, waiting.
The rival has read the same books. Walked the same floors. They believe this makes them your equal. It does not.
Victory over another seeker is a different kind of knowledge. The dungeon files it separately.
The room holds the particular silence of two minds measuring each other across a small space.
Defeat here is not shameful. The rival was shaped by the same dungeon that is shaping you. They had a head start.
You answered what the rival could not. Or you did not. Either way, the encounter has been recorded in the archive.
The rival's notes are still here. You recognize some of the questions. You wrote different answers.
